summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The iShares Asia 50 ETF (AIA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Asia 50 Capped TR index. The fund tracks an index of 50 of the largest companies from Hong Kong, South Korea, Singapore and Taiwan. AIA was launched on Nov 13, 2007 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Best Impact Investing ETFs for Q2 2021
data.text: The best impact investing ETFs for Q2 2021 are FAN, AIA, and GRID.

data.title: 3 Charts That Suggest Markets in Asia Are Headed Higher
data.text: Breaks beyond key resistance levels have active traders looking to these ETFs for exposure to countries such as China and South Korea.

data.title: Airline stocks in Asia take a hit amid growing coronavirus fears in China
data.text: Travel-related shares in Asia fell Tuesday as fears grew over an outbreak of a mysterious virus in China that has killed four people so far.

data.title: 3 Charts That Suggest  Markets in Asia Are Headed Higher
data.text: Traders have recently focused attention within North America, but these charts suggest that it's time to increase international exposure.

holdings.infoBox: AIA is an equity ETF with a total of 65 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 23.48%, Samsung Electronics at 14.50%, Tencent Holdings at 5.08%, Alibaba Group Holding at 4.56%, and SK hynix at 4.09%.
